services/git-bridge/pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated source/target configuration with the release flag to target Java 21.
services/git-bridge/pom.xml.why_exists: The source/target flags are deprecated in newer compiler plugin versions and do not enforce API compatibility; using release=21 is required to compile against Java 21 APIs and ensure bytecode compatibility.

services/git-bridge/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Guava dependency to a version compatible with Java 21.
services/git-bridge/pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of Guava (e.g., 19.0) may contain classes or methods that are incompatible with or removed in newer JDKs, or fail to compile/run on Java 21 due to internal API changes.
